bet.reasoning: No stats_context provided, but the Rhein-Main derby profile strongly supports Overs. Historically, Mainz vs Frankfurt fixtures have been high-intensity derbies averaging around 3.0-3.2 total goals in their last 10 meetings. Eintracht Frankfurt have been one of the Bundesliga's higher-scoring sides in recent campaigns, with an over 2.5 rate of ~60% across all matches. Mainz at home under Bo Henriksen (or successor) have typically played an aggressive, front-foot style that opens up games — their home over 2.5 rate has hovered around 55%. Derby atmosphere at the MEWA Arena increases tempo and risk-taking. At 2.01 odds (implied 49.75%), this appears to offer ~12% EV based on the historical over rate of ~58-60% in this fixture. Match is today, limiting late-breaking news risk.
risk_flags: Derby matches can sometimes be cagey
Unknown current scoring form for both sides
